title: Quist (disambiguation)
content:
'''Quist''' may refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*'''[[Restelly Quist]]''', a [[Jedi]] [[Chief Librarian]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*'''[[Quist (admiral)|Quist]]''', an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]
*'''[[Quist (pirate)|Quist]]''', a friend of [[Adar Tallon/Legends|Adar Tallon]] and warrior in the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] who eventually became a [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]]
*'''[[Restelly Quist/Legends|Restelly Quist]]''', a [[Jedi Lore Keeper]] of the Old [[Jedi Order/Legends|Jedi Order]] and co-author of ''[[The Jedi Path: A Manual for Students of the Force]]''
*'''[[Van P. Quist]]''', the owner of a [[Droid/Legends|droid]] store on [[R-duba]] who had a brief encounter with [[C-3PO/Legends|C-3PO]] and [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]]

===Non-canon===
*[[Quist (Gordonian)|Quist]], a resistance member on [[Aquilae (The Star Wars)|Aquilae]] or [[Townowi]]

{{Disambig}}
